steps.title: Use the later improvement
steps.content: Earlier research had a shortcoming: it focused narrowly on North America and Western Europe because data were limited. Later access to records from Asia and Eastern Europe would reduce that shortcoming by widening the geographic evidence base.

steps.title: Pick the problem-solving verb
steps.content: Choice A means assume beforehand, choice B means classify, and choice C means confirm. None fits researchers reducing the severity of a known limitation. "Mitigate" means make less severe, which matches the effect of broader data access. The answer is D.
